uplink.description: Status report - normal (3.6 V, 25.38 C, 68 %, alarm off)
uplink._note: Inputs are in-bounds (humidity 0-100). expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (R720B source of truth) and normalizing: Volt->battery, Temp->air.temperature, Humi->air.relativeHumidity, Alarm->extra alarm. Upstream out: Volt 3.6, Temp 25.38, Humi 68, Alarm OFF.

uplink.description: Status report - alarm on (3.0 V, 20.00 C, 50 %, alarm on)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input. Oracle (upstream) out: Volt 3, Temp 20, Humi 50, Alarm ON. byte8=1 -> extra alarm true.

uplink.description: Status report - low battery and negative temperature (3.2 V low, -1.00 C, 0 %)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input. byte3=0xA0 high bit set -> lowBattery extra, (0xA0&0x7F)/10=3.2 V. byte4-5=0xFF9C two's-complement -> -1.00 C. Oracle (upstream) out: Volt '3.2(low battery)', Temp -1, Humi 0, Alarm OFF.
Upstream example input. reportType byte2=0x00 is a device-info/startup frame (SWver/HWver/Datecode), not a measurement.

uplink.description: Config report response on fPort 7 is unsupported
uplink._note: Upstream example input. fPort 7 carries config command responses (ConfigReportRsp/ReadConfigReportRsp), not measurements.
